world_info.name: Arentiya
world_info.name_origin: Means 'hot land' in the ancient tongue. Derived from its wide grasslands and warm climate.
world_info.description: The grassland region south of Ersia. A warm land where trade and agriculture flourish.

grid.scale_note: As a fantasy map, strict scale is not applied.

world_info.tech_level: Medieval (iron age, magic coexistence, agriculture/pastoralism more developed than Ersia)
world_info.magic_system: Mana-based. Same system as Ersia, but spirit magic is more common in the south.

currency.system: Ersia copper/silver/gold coins accepted + Arentiya's own 'sun coin'
currency.notes: Ersia currency is widely accepted. Sun coins are used only in southern markets.

terrain.description: Arentiya terrain. Based on world_pos coordinates.

features.name: Aren Prairie
features.description: The vast grassland at the center of Arentiya. Tall grasses and wildflowers stretch across the land. Nomads and farmers coexist.

features.name: Western Hills
features.description: Gentle hill terrain to the west. The water source for Karla agricultural city.

features.name: Southeastern Sea
features.description: The southern extension of Ersia's Eastern Sea. Surha Port faces this sea.

features.name: Border Forest
features.description: A small forest extending from Ersia's Harun Forest. Gradually transitions to grassland further south.

features.name: Southern Arid Zone
features.description: Dry savanna at the southern edge of the Aren Prairie. Thorny bushes and dried grasses spread across the area.

features.name: Aren River
features.description: A river originating from the Western Hills, crossing the prairie and flowing into the Southeastern Sea. The lifeline of Karla agricultural city.

features.name: Southeastern Coastline
features.description: The Southeastern Sea coast. Where Surha Port is located.

baran_fortress.name: Baran Fortress
baran_fortress.description: A gateway fortress on the Ersia border. The starting point of the north-south trade road and garrison for the border guard.

talis.name: Talis
talis.description: A trade city in the middle of the Aren Prairie. A strategic point where north-south and east-west trade routes intersect. Famous for its tent market.

karla.name: Karla
karla.description: An agricultural city on the banks of the Aren River. The breadbasket of the prairie. Characterized by white plastered buildings and terracotta roofs.

surha.name: Surha
surha.description: A port city on the Southeastern Sea coast. A hub for maritime trade. Connected by sea route to Seren Port in Ersia.

grassland_nomad_alliance.description: A loose alliance of nomadic tribes that roam the Aren Prairie.

spirit_mage_tower.description: A spirit magic research organization based in Talis. Exchanges with the Ersia Mage Guild.

southern_merchant_guild.description: A maritime trade guild based in Surha Port.

common_monsters.prairie_wolf: Travels in packs across the wide prairie. Threatens livestock but sometimes coexists with nomads.
common_monsters.desert_scorpion: Inhabits the Southern Arid Zone. Has powerful venom.
common_monsters.prairie_goblin: Nests in prairie hills and raids caravans. More skilled at mounted combat than Ersia goblins.
common_monsters.spirit_tree: An ancient tree imbued with spirit power. Usually docile, but becomes aggressive when the forest is threatened.
common_monsters.sand_golem: A golem made of sand that guards ancient ruins in the Southern Arid Zone.
